Drift Protocol $285M Hack: Fake Token Drains Solana in 12 Min | byteiota Drift Protocol, a major Solana-based decentralized exchange, lost $285 million in just 12 minutes on April 1, 2026—making it the largest DeFi hack of the year and the second-largest in Solana’s history. The attack combined social engineering with a sophisticated technical exploit involving Solana’s “durable nonces” feature and a fake token called CarbonVote (CVT).
